description:
Overview:
【Mini Wifi Camera 】This mini security camera is the latest version. The image is clearer, the Wi-Fi signal is stronger, decreases device heat, improves battery capacity. This camera is easy to carry and use. You can use it as a home security camera, office and store monitoring, pet camera, dash camera, action cam, baby monitor.
【Remotely View Real-Time Video on APP】You can view live streaming video when this small nanny camera is connected to wifi; This wireless security cam has a 150-degree wide-angle, which make you can capture the clearer and wider image.
【Record HD 1080P Videos to Micro SD Card Without Wi-Fi】Only insert Micro SD Card (not included) into this mini nanny cam, next turn on this cam, next the mini wifi camera can auto-record HD video to Micro SD Card without Wi-Fi; It can also record videos even if the network is offline. Don't worry evidence is lost. You can use this mini wireless camera indoor and outdoor.
【Motion sensor Detection Alarm and Record】This wireless camera will send push notifications with images to your phone once motion is detected. You can also set a motion sensor detection record on a Micro SD card, it can save memory card capacity.
【24/7 Monitoring with Night Vision】This wireless security camera has 6 infrared led lights, it can capture a clear image in the dark; This nanny camera supports battery-powered and plugged into external power sources.

Specifications:
Pixel: 2 million (dpi)
Image sensor: CMOS
Working temperature: -25-45 (℃)
Weight: 28G stand-alone
Alarm function: motion detection alarm
Material: ABS injection
Use environment: multi-functional and multi-purpose
Effective distance: greater than 15M
Surveillance camera lens: F23
Irradiation distance of infrared light: more than 6 meters
Specifications: Ultra-clear version without card
Charging method: USB

Package Content:
Camera X1

variants.name: Mini USB1080P Camera Night Vision Baby Monitor Wireless Surveillance Home Security Camera No card version
